prompt: Inserting toilet icon to the map.
prompt_refined: Modify image 1, the map of Kennedy Town, by inserting a toilet icon. The inserted icon should match the black and white silhouette style shown in image 2 and be placed clearly visible within the green shaded area representing Belcher Bay Promenade.
